name: Sour Cream Apple Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend flour, sugar and margarine until crumbly. Stir in nuts.
2. Press 2-3/4 cups of the crumb mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
3. To the remaining mixture, add the remaining ingredients. Stir in apples.
4. Spoon over the base. Bake for 25 - 30 minutes.
5. Cut into squares. Serve with whipped cream.
